tier1-.yaml 11 本

alertPolicies: burn-rate-fast / burn-rate-slow
CODEOWNERS: SRE(B) + 事業責任者(A) 共同承認

div.div:
Alertmanager / Multi-window Multi-burn-rate
fast burn: 5m × 14.4× = PagerDuty 即時起床 / Sev2
slow burn: 1h × 6× = 翌営業日レビュー / Sev3
fast + slow 同時 = Sev1 (24/7 即時起床)
daily trend: 24h 予算消費率 週次可視化

div.div: EB (Error Budget) 計算: (1 - SLO) × 月間秒数 (30.44d)。Availability 99.95% = 21m36s / 99.9% = 43m12s / 99.5% = 3h36m

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
